title: sorghum capillare
intro: Sorghum capillare, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of sorghum capillare include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Sorghum capillare can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in topical applications such as salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
